prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别约为8277名、8442名、7708名、6885名、8814名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次前移至6885名后，2025年大幅后移至 8814名，近两年波动幅度约2000名，2025年基准位次约8814名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021年54人、2022年52人、2023年52人、2024年52人、2025年50人 ，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势。2026年计划49人，较2025年再减1人，缩招约2%，招生名额持续收紧对竞争格局有一定影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校，软科主榜排名近年稳步上升：2021年第91名→2022年第97名→2023年第96名→2024年第102名→2025年第86名→2026年第88名，整体处于全国前100强，在医药类院校中位 居前列；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及教师师德师风事件（理学院教师被指性骚扰学生），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用。 抖音热度排名第90，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高。未见明显投档断档记录；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A+学科，也是核心王牌专业。中药 学、生物制药等相关学科实力突出，对医药方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学类、临床药学、生物制药等专业社会热度持续偏热，医药类专业整体推荐度高。 吉林省2026年高考总报名约110868人，按历史比例估算物理类约79936人，与2025年80421人基本持平，竞争基数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划小幅缩减（缩招2%）、药学A+学科持续高热、学校软科排名稳步上升等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基准8814名 基础上略有前移。预测最低位次约8758名，区间8258–9258名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 8277, 8442, 7708, 6885, and 8814 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. After the ranking moved forward to 6885 in 2024, it significantly moved back to 8814 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 2000 positions in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8814. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 54 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 52 in 2024, and 50 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 49, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 2%. The continuous tightening of enrollment quotas has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily increased in recent years: 91st in 2021 → 97th in 2022 → 96th in 2023 → 102nd in 2024 → 86th in 2025 → 88th in 2026, overall within the top 100 nationally, ranking among the top in pharmaceutical institutions. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (a teacher from the School of Science was accused of sexually harassing students), which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps was found. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the only A+ discipline of the university, and its core flagship major. Related disciplines such as Chinese Materia Medica and Biopharmaceuticals have outstanding strength, strongly attracting candidates interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Pharmacy, Clinical Pharmacy, and Biopharmaceuticals continue to have high social popularity, with overall high recommendation for medical and pharmaceutical majors. The total number of registrations for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category is about 79,936, basically the same as 80,421 in 2025, with a stable competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward movement of rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (reduction of 2%), the sustained high popularity of the A+ Pharmacy discipline, and the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 8814. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8758, with a range of 8258 to 9258.

- Chinese Materia Medica (Top Innovation Class)

- Pharmaceutical Administration

- Chinese Materia Medica Category (Chinese Materia Medica, Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Chinese Medicine Pharmaceuticals)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8258–9258, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy Category, Clinical Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals) as the main choices, with Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes as sprint targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety options. The A+ Pharmacy discipline has outstanding strength, so it is recommended to prioritize Pharmacy Category and related majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类（含文科）最低位次分别约为1683名、1816名、1841名、1802名、2202名。2021–2024年位次稳定在1683–1841名之间，2025年明显后移至2202 名，较2024年后移约400名，波动幅度加大；该校在吉林省历史类招生计划2021年2人、2022年4人、2023年4人、2024年4人、2025年5人。2026年计划 大幅增至8人，较2025年扩招60%，招生名额显著增加将明显影响竞争格局。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名2026年第88名，在医药类 院校中位居前列，对文科考生而言属于中等偏上层次；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及教师师德师风事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制。抖音 热度排名第90（一般），短视频曝光度不高。未见历史类投档断档记录；药学为A+学科，但历史类招生专业为经济管理试验班（医药方向）和英语（医药方向） ，与药学核心学科关联度较低，学科优势对文科考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理类专业社会热度分化观望，英语专业热度一般观望。吉林省2026年高考 总报名约110868人，按历史比例估算历史类约30932人，与2025年31071人基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次明显后移的趋势、20 26年历史类招生计划大幅扩招60%、历史类考生总数基本持平、文科专业与药学核心学科关联度较低等因素，预计2026年历史类最低录取位次在2025年基准2202名基础上显著后移 。预测最低位次约2965名，区间2465–3465名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1683, 1816, 1841, 1802, and 2202 respectively. Rankings were stable between 1683 and 1841 from 2021 to 2024, but shifted significantly backward to 2202 in 2025, moving back about 400 places compared to 2024, with increased volatility. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 2 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan sharply increases to 8 students, a 60% expansion compared to 2025, significantly affecting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 88th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, placing it among the top tier of medical and pharmaceutical institutions, and at an upper-middle level for liberal arts candidates. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct, which may mildly suppress application willingness. Douyin popularity ranking is 90th (average), with low short video exposure. No record of gaps in History Category admissions; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline, but the History Category enrollment majors are Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction), which have low correlation with the core pharmacy discipline, limiting the appeal of disciplinary advantages to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics and management majors is divided and wait-and-see, while English majors are generally wait-and-see. The total number of Jilin Province 2026 college entrance examination registrants is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 30,932 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, roughly flat compared to 31,071 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the 60% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026, the roughly stable total number of History Category candidates, and the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the core pharmacy discipline, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift significantly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2202. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2965, with a range of 2465 to 3465.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction) (Only English test takers)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2465 to 3465, there are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category. The Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) has relatively higher ranking requirements and can be considered as Tier 1, while English (Pharmaceutical Direction) has relatively lower rankings and can be a safe choice. Given the large enrollment expansion in 2026, candidates with rankings in the middle to back of the range have a higher probability of admission.
